title: Bulgaria halts cancer screening programme, claiming high test costs [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Bulgaria's cancer screening programme, worth €10.4 million, was launched two years ago as part of efforts to tackle the nation's high cancer mortality rate, its halted despite rising cancer incidence
summary_public: Bulgaria's cancer screening programme, worth €10.4 million, was launched two years ago as part of efforts to tackle the nation's high cancer mortality rate, its halted despite rising cancer incidence

BG.label: negative
BG.evidence: Bulgaria halts cancer screening programme, claiming high test costs
